title: A heartfelt farewell to matron Ros Rubidge
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High School warmed up a wintry Monday morning among the blooms of the beloved Max Kroon garden, to hold a very special farewell for a woman who has left an indelible mark on the hearts of many - Matron Ros Rubidge.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - Union High School warmed up a wintry Monday morning among the blooms of the beloved Max Kroon garden, to hold a very special farewell for a woman who has left an indelible mark on the hearts of many - Matron Ros Rubidge."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Gathered together in a spirit of gratitude, staff and parents came to honour Ros, who has been an integral part of the Max Kroon House family for the past 20 years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The celebration was not only a goodbye, but a moving tribute to the profound impact she has had on generations of children and their families.","html":"The celebration was not only a goodbye, but a moving tribute to the profound impact she has had on generations of children and their families."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In a heartfelt speech, Vanessa Copeman spoke on behalf of everyone present and those who couldn’t be there in person, capturing what Ros has meant to the community.","html":"In a heartfelt speech, Vanessa Copeman spoke on behalf of everyone present and those who couldn’t be there in person, capturing what Ros has meant to the community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Today, we are all here to honour a very special person, Ros,” she said.","html":"\"Today, we are all here to honour a very special person, Ros,” she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“It’s truly special to see you all here as we celebrate Ros and the incredible role she has played in our lives.”","html":"“It’s truly special to see you all here as we celebrate Ros and the incredible role she has played in our lives.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Ros’ journey at Max Kroon began two decades ago.","html":"Ros’ journey at Max Kroon began two decades ago."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Over the years, she has not only cared for and guided countless children, but helped shape them into the kind, confident young adults they are today.","html":"Over the years, she has not only cared for and guided countless children, but helped shape them into the kind, confident young adults they are today."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With humour, Vanessa added, “Now, my maths may not be the best - my children of 10 remind me of that - but by my calculations, if Ros started here 20 years ago, her first group of Grade 1s would now be around 27 years old!”","html":"With humour, Vanessa added, “Now, my maths may not be the best - my children of 10 remind me of that - but by my calculations, if Ros started here 20 years ago, her first group of Grade 1s would now be around 27 years old!”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The sentiment throughout the morning was clear: Ros is deeply cherished.","html":"The sentiment throughout the morning was clear: Ros is deeply cherished."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"You’ve touched the lives of countless children and parents with your wisdom, care and endless love,” Vanessa said.","html":"\"You’ve touched the lives of countless children and parents with your wisdom, care and endless love,” Vanessa said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"For this, we are, and always will be, incredibly grateful.”","html":"\"For this, we are, and always will be, incredibly grateful.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"As a token of appreciation, Ros will be gifted with a beautifully curated Memory Book filled with photos, heartfelt messages and colourful drawings.","html":"As a token of appreciation, Ros will be gifted with a beautifully curated Memory Book filled with photos, heartfelt messages and colourful drawings."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It has been a privilege to help put it together,” said Vanessa. \"I laughed and cried as I went through the special memories that were shared. You are truly one of a kind.”","html":"\"It has been a privilege to help put it together,” said Vanessa. \"I laughed and cried as I went through the special memories that were shared. You are truly one of a kind.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Though this chapter may be ending, Ros’ legacy at Max Kroon will live on. A special bench has been placed in the garden she loves so dearly, an enduring symbol of the comfort, strength and the love she brought to the school.","html":"Though this chapter may be ending, Ros’ legacy at Max Kroon will live on. A special bench has been placed in the garden she loves so dearly, an enduring symbol of the comfort, strength and the love she brought to the school."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“Thank you for dedicating your life to our children,” Vanessa said. “Thank you for loving our children as your own.","html":"“Thank you for dedicating your life to our children,” Vanessa said. “Thank you for loving our children as your own."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you for being their second mommy when we couldn’t be there. And most of all, thank you for being our special Matron Ros.”","html":"Thank you for being their second mommy when we couldn’t be there. And most of all, thank you for being our special Matron Ros.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With emotions running high, Justin Kingwill, chairperson of the Union Preparatory school governing body, was then invited to say a few words, followed by a lovely speech by matron Demi van der Rheede. Everyone present was then invited to enjoy the selection of tea and eats.","html":"With emotions running high, Justin Kingwill, chairperson of the Union Preparatory school governing body, was then invited to say a few words, followed by a lovely speech by matron Demi van der Rheede. Everyone present was then invited to enjoy the selection of tea and eats."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: A heartfelt farewell to matron Ros Rubidge
